scripts.build: npm run build -w @claw-kit/core && npm run build -w @claw-kit/cli && npm run build -w @claw-kit/openclaw-adapter && npm run build -w @claw-kit/codex-adapter
scripts.check: npm run build -w @claw-kit/core && npm run check -w @claw-kit/cli && npm run check -w @claw-kit/openclaw-adapter && npm run check -w @claw-kit/codex-adapter
scripts.test: npm run build -w @claw-kit/core && npm run build -w @claw-kit/cli && npm run test -w @claw-kit/core && npm run test -w @claw-kit/cli
